\section{Word-Count Declaration}
\label{app:word_declaration}

\noindent This appendix provides a transparent word-count declaration for
this dissertation, satisfying examiner and institutional requirements for
explicit word-budget accounting. All counts strip LaTeX commands, comments,
suppressed (\texttt{\textbackslash iffalse} ... \texttt{\textbackslash fi})
blocks, and the textual content of tables and figures. Page estimates assume
$\sim$\,250 words per page (double-spaced, 12\,pt Times Roman).

\vspace{0.5em}\noindent\textit{Note.} Counts exclude LaTeX commands, comments, math expressions, content of tables and figures, and content inside \texttt{\textbackslash iffalse\ldots\textbackslash fi} suppression blocks. Page estimates use 250~words per page; the actual rendered PDF (675~pp) differs because LaTeX uses variable page density depending on figure and table placement.

\subsection*{Word Budget and Compliance Statement}

\noindent The dissertation body (Chapters~1--5) totals \textbf{38{,}337 words}, within typical doctoral expectations for a DBA dissertation. The appendices total \textbf{92{,}469 words} of supplementary, reference, and self-assessment material. Many institutions count only the main body toward the word limit; appendices, references, tables, and figures are commonly excluded under standard counting conventions. The candidate confirms that:

\begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*, itemsep=2pt]
    \item All counts are computed by automated text extraction, excluding LaTeX markup, mathematical content, table/figure interiors, and suppressed blocks.
    \item Each chapter falls within or near the typical DBA range (4{,}000 to 12{,}000 words per chapter, totalling 30{,}000 to 60{,}000 words for the main body).
    \item Appendix content is supplementary and includes large auto-generated dashboards (examiner Q\&A coverage, brutal-feedback tables, AI usage declaration, word-count declaration) that should be excluded from any word-limit count under standard institutional conventions.
    \item The script that produced this declaration is preserved at \texttt{singledisease\_ASD/build\_word\_declaration.py} for re-generation after revisions.
\end{itemize}

\noindent Should the doctoral committee require a stricter accounting that includes appendix content, the candidate proposes excluding three categories: (a)~the five \texttt{qa\_chN} examiner question banks (32{,}822 words combined), (b)~the auto-generated quality reports / stats / heading indexes (6{,}958 words combined), and (c)~the per-chapter \texttt{guideline\_report} and \texttt{ggu\_checklist} self-assessment files (1{,}946 words combined). These three categories total 41{,}726 words of auto-generated or check-list content; their removal from the count yields a thesis body-plus-substantive-appendices total of 91{,}143 words, within the 100{,}000-word institutional cap that the candidate is targeting.
